main.description: A work item for phi's background exploration queue. Each record is one thing to research.

kind.description: Type of exploration: explore_handle, explore_topic, or explore_url.

subject.description: The handle, topic, or URL to explore.

source.description: How this item was queued: interaction, extraction, or operator.

status.description: Current status of the queue item.

sourceUri.description: Optional AT-URI of the interaction that triggered this item.

updatedAt.description: When the item was last updated.
